W. mi81 .(3T(, f^TFfT ^ 19, 3TRH * ^ T W 2013 m\ GraroRUT)II,*nis 3, OT *ms)-iflrf 21 at fcr^ ( ^ yzmf^r §f afri 2013 2575 GI/2013 (1) -- 1 of 2 -- 2 T H E G A Z E T T E O F I N D I A : E X T R A O R D I N A R Y [PART I I — S E C . 3(i)] M I N I S T R Y O F F I N A N C E ( D e p a r t m e n t of R e v e n u e ) N O T I F I C A T I O N New Delhi, 10th June, 2013 G.S.R 365 ( E ) . – I n exercise of the powers conferred by clause (a) of Section 9 of the Prevention of Illicit Traffic i n Narcotic Drugs and Psychotropic Substances Act, 1988 (46 of 1988) and i n supersession of the Notification of the Government of India, Ministry of Finance, Department of Revenue No. GSR. 181(E), dated 19th March, 2013 except as respects things done or omitted to be done before such supersession, the Central Government hereby constitutes an Advisory Board with immediate effect for a period upto 22nd March, 2014, consisting of :— (i) Hon’ble Dr. Justice S. Muralidhar, Chairman (ii) Hon’ble Mr. Justice VipinSanghi, Member (iii) Hon’ble Mr. Justice Suresh Kait, Member [F. No. U.11016/01/2011-PITNDPS] VINESH PACHNANDA, Under Secy. ( P I T N D P S ) F o o t n o t e : The Notification G.S.R.181(E) dated 19th March, 2013 was published in the Gazette of India(Extraordinary) Part II,Section 3, Sub-Section-(i) on 21st March, 2013.
